overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a journey through a stormy mountain pass at night. The player character walks along an ancient stone path during heavy rainfall, eventually catching up to and following an NPC in dark robes through the winding trail flanked by rocky cliffs and wooden barriers.

events.description: distant robed figure becomes visible walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet stone path through the mountain valley

entered.detail: dark jagged cliff face forming the left valley wall
steep rocky slope with leaning stone pillars on the right
wet ancient cobblestone trail winding through the mountains
tall thin rock spire visible against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain valley during a heavy nighttime storm. The camera moves forward along a wet cobblestone path flanked by distant rocky cliffs, with low visibility from the rain. Toward the end, a distant figure becomes visible walking ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with wooden barriers

events.description: camera catches up to and begins following the robed figure ahead
waterfall becomes visible streaming down the left cliff face

agents.ego_description: following the robed NPC up the stone steps and around the bends of the mountain path

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path wearing dark hooded robes

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and barriers lining the left side of the path
cascading water streaming down the distant cliff face
gnarled leafless tree beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a winding mountain trail where the camera follows a robed figure. Wooden barriers appear along the left side of the cobblestone path as the terrain becomes more enclosed by steep rock faces. A waterfall becomes visible on the left cliff face, and a dead tree stands beside the path as the journey continues through the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, storm-lashed mountain valley that gradually narrows into a claustrophobic cliffside trail. It begins by gliding forward along a wet cobblestone path under a heavy nighttime rain, where distant rocky cliffs are shrouded in low visibility. As the camera advances, a solitary robed figure emerges from the gloom ahead, drawing the viewer deeper into the storm. The scene then shifts as the path tightens and winds between steep rock faces, introducing wooden barriers and a cascading waterfall on the left. Finally, the journey continues past a skeletal dead tree as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed by the towering mountain walls.
